ValidationRule.description: Quote Date and Quote Amount are mandatory from Quote Acceptance stage onwards.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Quote Acceptance'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Funds (Negotiation)'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won') ), OR( ISBLANK(Quote_Date__c), ISBLANK(Quote_Amount__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Quote Date and Quote Amount are required from the Quote Acceptance stage onwards.
